children.heading: United States law to prevail in event of conflict
children.label: a United States law to prevail in event of conflict
children.text: No provision of any trade agreement entered into under , nor the application of any such provision to any person or circumstance, that is inconsistent with any law of the United States, any State of the United States, or any locality of the United States shall have effect.section 4202(b) of this title

children.heading: Amendments or modifications of United States law
children.label: b Amendments or modifications of United States law
children.text: No provision of any trade agreement entered into under shall prevent the United States, any State of the United States, or any locality of the United States from amending or modifying any law of the United States, that State, or that locality (as the case may be).section 4202(b) of this title

children.heading: Dispute settlement reports
children.label: c Dispute settlement reports
children.text: Reports, including findings and recommendations, issued by dispute settlement panels convened pursuant to any trade agreement entered into under shall have no binding effect on the law of the United States, the Government of the United States, or the law or government of any State or locality of the United States.section 4202(b) of this title
